short_summary: El Niño active, wildfire risk elevated
rationale: El Niño confirmation directly sustains elevated wildfire and drought risk for Portugal/Iberia, which is the most relevant ongoing threat to a Portuguese resident's daily life.

top_events.title: El Niño under way and threatens weather extremes
top_events.summary: Scientists confirm El Niño is active; this directly sustains elevated wildfire, drought and extreme heat risk for Portugal, with real impact on agriculture, tourism and daily life.

top_events.title: Pope Leo visits Canary Islands to highlight perilous migrant journeys
top_events.summary: Pope's visit to the Canary Islands draws attention to Atlantic migration routes; mild relevance to Portugal given shared Atlantic exposure and EU migration policy debates.

top_events.title: Trump administration sanctions Cuba's national oil company
top_events.summary: US tightens Cuba sanctions; indirect relevance to Portugal via Lusophone Atlantic ties and potential migration/economic ripple effects, but limited direct impact.
